title: Illage and Spillage: Respillaged
description: A continuation of the discontinued Illage and Spillage mod
body:
**DISCLAIMER: I did NOT make the original mod. This is a port and continuation of the original mod made with the original creator’s permission. Original coding, textures, models, sounds, animations, and everything else is from the original mod by Yellowbross Productions which can be found [HERE](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illage-and-spillage)**

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92c693f0b99241235f834f13c33a69aa90eabbdd.png)

This mod is a continuation of Yellobross Productions's Illage and Spillage mod, which has been discontinued.

## **Goons**

**Engineer:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
    
  ![Engineer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kLoMCc4b/images/29d78dfb6a64ce2b4cccca5d53dce9dc9108df57.png)
_Despite being a redstone genius, the Engineer is frequently mocked by other Illagers for his lack of skills in combat... at least until they meet his inventions_

While not able to attack on their own, Engineers will run around villages occasionally building hostile machines. These machines are:

_Chagrin Sentry_: A stationary turret that has two cannons for arms and can fire arrows at extremely rapid rates. They are prone to overheating though, so use that window when they do to dismantle them

_Hinder_: A small but durable machine with healing capabilities. Low health Illagers nearby will flee to them for healing. Hinders heal Illagers rapidly, but only in a fairly small range

_Factory_: A miniature factory that can produce smaller minions that serve as bodyguards to the Engineer. These minions range from small and fast melee pokers, to flying snipers, and even to little beeping creepers!

Additionally when one of the Engineer's machines is damaged, the Engineer will quickly come over and try to repair it.
  
</details>


## **Bosses:**

**Freakager:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
  ![Freakager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/904f7cd53b10b86cc69920d55f0d3114fcc48d22_0.webp)
_twisted biologist from the depths of the Nether, sure to give you nightmares for days!!!!!_

Along with all of his attacks from the [original mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illage-and-spillage), Freakager and Ragno can also do the following:

**Freakager:**

_Minions_: Freakager will throw out several minions. Depending on his health, he'll either throw Funnybones, annoying little miniature skeleton rascals that throw bones and laugh at your pain, or Eyesores, erratically slithering eyeballs which can fling you in the air if you slip on them

_Axe Barrage_: When under half health, Freakager gets extremely infuriated with you and hurls hundreds of axes at you at once! This is easily his most devastating attack, so be careful

**Ragno:**

_Whack_: If you get too close when Freakager is still alive, Ragno will try to whack you away

_Jump_: When Freakager or Ragno is under half health, Ragno will occasionally jump to a location nearby. If Ragno is under half health, it'll try to jump directly on top of its target

_Web Net_: Ragno can spit a net at you. If it catches you, run as fast as you can in the opposite direction before Ragno can reel you in!

_Mutation Breath_: When under half health, Ragno can try to grab you. If you get grabbed, Ragno sprays mutation substance all over you!

</details>


**Other Mobs:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
This mod has many other mobs and bosses. See the [original mod's description](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illage-and-spillage) for info on all of those
</details>

**Future Plans:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
**Next update:**

- More goons (normal enemies)
- Some other minor features
 

**Future update(s):**

- Re-implement and complete Devastator (maybe. Cant say for sure if this will actually happen)
- Port my Harder Illage and Spillage mod in the form of a Nightmare Mode config
- Add Grim Freakager? (Very unlikely, but not impossible)
- Add Inventor? (Very unlikely, but not impossible)

</details>

**Known Issues:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
Currently there are no known issues (yay!)

If you find any issues, report them on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/TheDarkPeasant/Illage-and-Spillage--Respillaged/issues) and I'll add them to this list to be fixed next update

</details>

**FAQ:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
**Can I use this in my video/modpack?**

Sure! Just make sure to leave a link back to the original page here on Curseforge.

**Can you make a port to version/mod loader?**
Maybe in the future I will port this mod to newer versions, but there will be no official backports of new features to older versions. As for mod loaders, most likely not. I have never learned any other mod loader, nor do I plan to. However, if you'd like to make a port to any version or mod loader, the source code is available [here](https://github.com/TheDarkPeasant/Illage-and-Spillage--Respillaged). Just remember to ask me for permission first if you plan to upload it publicly :)

**I found a crash/issue, where do I report it?**

Just report any issues on the [issue tracker](https://github.com/TheDarkPeasant/Illage-and-Spillage--Respillaged/issues). Said issue will also be added to the Known Issues spoiler to be fixed next update.

**Do you have any more content planned? If so, what is it?**

Initially there were no plans for new mobs or other major content pieces, but this mod now actually has a team formed around it, so more content will be coming. See the **Future Plans** spoiler for some things planned

</details>

**Credits:**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
